title: Add to cart updates counter instantly
source_description: User can add a product to the cart from the product detail page and see the cart count update immediately.
expected_result: Cart count updates on product add
kane_code:
import os
import testmu
from testmu import expect, var, set_var
from playwright.async_api import Page

testmu.configure(
    build="3e3a4f5a-1ab9-4a8f-9462-d2f9daea285a",
    name="Add Item to Cart and Verify Counter Update",
    tc_id="TC-41441",
    network=os.getenv("NETWORK", "false").lower() == "true",
    default_action_timeout_ms=10000,
    default_navigation_timeout_ms=30000,
    kane_run_v4=True,
)

async def _resolve_ranked_locator(page, locators, description=""):
    """Return the first locator in *locators* that matches at least one element.

    Mirrors Selenium's ranked-selector iteration: tries each locator in the
    order supplied and stops at the first match, preserving selector rank
    priority rather than DOM order (which .or_().first would use).

    When no locator resolves:
      - description provided (V3 path): returns ``testmu.locator(page,
        description=description)`` — a VisionLocator that triggers the heal
        cascade when its action method is awaited.
      - description omitted (V4 path): raises ``TimeoutError``.
    """
    for _loc in locators:
        if await _loc.count() > 0:
            return _loc
    if description:
        import testmu
        return testmu.locator(page, description=description)
    raise TimeoutError("ranked locator resolution exhausted — no selector matched")


@testmu.test
async def test(page: Page):
    async with testmu.step('Navigate to https://ecommerce-playground.lambdatest.io/', instruction_id='837421d9-0124-4b3a-a0f3-0149b85e64f6'):
        await page.goto("https://ecommerce-playground.lambdatest.io/")
    
    async with testmu.step('Typing iPhone in product search input', instruction_id='4bf04240-66d2-4eee-a5ed-32107b62aa1b'):
        element_0 = page.locator("internal:role=textbox[name=\"Search For Products\"i]")
        
        await element_0.click()
        await element_0.fill("iPhone")
    
    async with testmu.step('Clicking iPhone product link in the search suggestions', instruction_id='832f8f5c-1ceb-44cf-a555-7685cfdf0ce6'):
        _loc_1 = page.locator("internal:role=link[name=\"iPhone\"i] >> nth=1")
        
        await _loc_1.click()
    
    async with testmu.step('Typing MacBook in the search box', instruction_id='5abd077a-fcee-4959-86e1-62580a23aa24'):
        element_1 = page.locator("internal:role=textbox[name=\"Search For Products\"i]")
        
        await element_1.click()
        await element_1.fill("MacBook")
    
    async with testmu.step('Clicking MacBook link in search autocomplete dropdown', instruction_id='477ce339-0ff9-4e1f-ac5d-3a78e1185de8'):
        _loc_2 = page.locator("internal:role=link[name=\"MacBook\"i] >> nth=1")
        
        await _loc_2.click()
    
    async with testmu.step('Typing iPod in product search box', instruction_id='e5286ae0-0a03-4bf8-9988-a69327ce14c7'):
        element_2 = page.locator("internal:role=textbox[name=\"Search For Products\"i]")
        
        await element_2.click()
        await element_2.fill("iPod")
    
    async with testmu.step('Clicking iPod Touch in search suggestions dropdown', instruction_id='7fa173ac-b75f-47c8-ae41-50a6b24bac69'):
        _loc_3 = page.locator("internal:text=\"iPod Touch\"i")
        
        await _loc_3.click()
    
    async with testmu.step('Clicking the Home link in the main navigation bar', instruction_id='9a24e73a-c0d6-4bc7-bba3-04e84d52a78d'):
        _loc_4 = page.locator("#widget-navbar-217834 >> internal:role=link[name=\"Home\"i]")
        
        await _loc_4.click()
    
    async with testmu.step('Scrolling through product listings', instruction_id='d6f98a79-7bb8-47ae-8397-cd28e813848c'):
        await page.wait_for_load_state('domcontentloaded', timeout=5000)
        await page.evaluate('window.scrollBy(0, 886)')
    
    async with testmu.step('Scrolling down the featured product cards section', instruction_id='99d22c77-c7c1-4d72-bd00-aeb38ed03049'):
        await page.wait_for_load_state('domcontentloaded', timeout=5000)
        await page.evaluate('window.scrollBy(0, 500)')
    
    async with testmu.step('Scrolling down the Top Products product cards section below the banner', instruction_id='bde00f19-cabe-483c-8536-11eeaec8d336'):
        await page.wait_for_load_state('domcontentloaded', timeout=5000)
        await page.evaluate('window.scrollBy(0, 450)')
    
    async with testmu.step('Clicking the HTC Touch HD product link in the top products carousel', instruction_id='567f1a10-df0a-4a59-b25b-24e46f25d59c'):
        _loc_5 = page.locator("internal:role=link[name=\"HTC Touch HD\"i] >> nth=1")
        
        await _loc_5.click()
    
    async with testmu.step('PRIMARY: Add to Cart button for HTC Touch HD; role=button; text="IN STOCK" | HINTS: position=center-right; color=dark gray; container=product purchase panel below the $146.00 price and to the right of the quantity stepper; this is the left of the two adjacent \'IN STOCK\' buttons', instruction_id='d6be70c7-7267-4f10-b6dc-70f303cc6ddd'):
        coords = await testmu.get_vision_coordinates(page, 'PRIMARY: Add to Cart button for HTC Touch HD; role=button; text="IN STOCK" | HINTS: position=center-right; color=dark gray; container=product purchase panel below the $146.00 price and to the right of the quantity stepper; this is the left of the two adjacent \'IN STOCK\' buttons', "click", 1219, 647)
        await page.mouse.click(coords['x'], coords['y'])
        
    
    async with testmu.step('PRIMARY: Add to Cart button for HTC Touch HD | HINTS: position=center-right; the dark gray pill-shaped button immediately to the right of the quantity selector and to the left of the light blue button in the product purchase panel', instruction_id='46a412af-8d7d-4259-bb61-86eb8dba7999'):
        coords = await testmu.get_vision_coordinates(page, 'PRIMARY: Add to Cart button for HTC Touch HD | HINTS: position=center-right; the dark gray pill-shaped button immediately to the right of the quantity selector and to the left of the light blue button in the product purchase panel', "click", 1219, 643)
        await page.mouse.click(coords['x'], coords['y'])
        
    
    async with testmu.step('PRIMARY: Add to Cart button for HTC Touch HD | HINTS: position=center-right; the light blue pill-shaped button to the right of the dark gray button in the product purchase panel below the $146.00 price', instruction_id='0120bbba-f253-4b45-9b78-e6c657bc4e8a'):
        coords = await testmu.get_vision_coordinates(page, 'PRIMARY: Add to Cart button for HTC Touch HD | HINTS: position=center-right; the light blue pill-shaped button to the right of the dark gray button in the product purchase panel below the $146.00 price', "click", 1422, 645)
        await page.mouse.click(coords['x'], coords['y'])
        
    
    async with testmu.step('PRIMARY: Add to Cart button for HTC Touch HD; role=button; text="IN STOCK" | HINTS: position=center-right; container=product purchase panel below the $146.00 price; this is the left dark gray pill-shaped button immediately to the right of the quantity stepper, confirmed as the Add to Cart control by DOM query; do not click the right light blue IN STOCK button', instruction_id='121dc735-5ab7-4093-b39a-1343a5c51425'):
        coords = await testmu.get_vision_coordinates(page, 'PRIMARY: Add to Cart button for HTC Touch HD; role=button; text="IN STOCK" | HINTS: position=center-right; container=product purchase panel below the $146.00 price; this is the left dark gray pill-shaped button immediately to the right of the quantity stepper, confirmed as the Add to Cart control by DOM query; do not click the right light blue IN STOCK button', "click", 1219, 645)
        await page.mouse.click(coords['x'], coords['y'])
        
    
    async with testmu.step("PRIMARY: Add to Cart button for HTC Touch HD | HINTS: position=center-right; container=product purchase panel beside the quantity stepper; click the dark gray pill-shaped button centered between the white quantity box and the light blue button, not the red 'In Stock' availability label above", instruction_id='ea14abb6-1f08-4d90-9f62-f210a399d2cb'):
        coords = await testmu.get_vision_coordinates(page, "PRIMARY: Add to Cart button for HTC Touch HD | HINTS: position=center-right; container=product purchase panel beside the quantity stepper; click the dark gray pill-shaped button centered between the white quantity box and the light blue button, not the red 'In Stock' availability label above", "click", 1223, 645)
        await page.mouse.click(coords['x'], coords['y'])
        
    
    async with testmu.step('PRIMARY: Add to Cart button for HTC Touch HD; role=button; text="IN STOCK" | HINTS: position=center-right; container=product purchase panel directly below the $146.00 price; click the dark gray left pill-shaped button between the quantity stepper and the light blue button', instruction_id='6bd89d66-3679-46ff-98a3-8cf64ad8e246'):
        coords = await testmu.get_vision_coordinates(page, 'PRIMARY: Add to Cart button for HTC Touch HD; role=button; text="IN STOCK" | HINTS: position=center-right; container=product purchase panel directly below the $146.00 price; click the dark gray left pill-shaped button between the quantity stepper and the light blue button', "click", 1219, 493)
        await page.mouse.click(coords['x'], coords['y'])
        
    
    async with testmu.step('Pressing Tab to move focus toward the purchase controls', instruction_id='3b61a205-48da-42e7-abc4-fac8a3692e74'):
        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        await page.keyboard.press('Tab')
    
    async with testmu.step('Pressing Tab key to move focus to product purchase controls', instruction_id='d99d691b-eecb-4260-9ec8-6916b97a8123'):
        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        await page.keyboard.press('Tab')
    
    async with testmu.step('PRIMARY: Add to Cart button for HTC Touch HD | HINTS: position=center-right; container=product purchase panel below the $146.00 price; click the dark gray pill-shaped button immediately to the right of the white quantity box showing 1 and immediately to the left of the light blue pill button; target the center of the dark gray button, not the red availability badge above', instruction_id='725d18ea-5e66-4d6a-96a8-0c963c3970b1'):
        coords = await testmu.get_vision_coordinates(page, 'PRIMARY: Add to Cart button for HTC Touch HD | HINTS: position=center-right; container=product purchase panel below the $146.00 price; click the dark gray pill-shaped button immediately to the right of the white quantity box showing 1 and immediately to the left of the light blue pill button; target the center of the dark gray button, not the red availability badge above', "click", 1217, 494)
        await page.mouse.click(coords['x'], coords['y'])
        
    
    async with testmu.step('Clicking quantity input for HTC Touch HD', instruction_id='ff0ab4a2-d452-454f-9470-b07bfffd32b4'):
        _loc_6 = page.locator("internal:role=spinbutton[name=\"Qty\"i]")
        
        await _loc_6.click()
    
    async with testmu.step('Pressing Tab key', instruction_id='37a74c1e-d698-4d23-a36b-81675c4860b3'):
        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        await page.keyboard.press('Tab')
    
    async with testmu.step('Pressing the Tab key', instruction_id='e5d0a3b4-391b-4118-acb8-324a67c6ed6c'):
        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        await page.keyboard.press('Tab')
    
    async with testmu.step('Pressing the Enter key', instruction_id='7c3b4517-e099-4a7d-9a22-15aec6132a6b'):
        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        await page.keyboard.press('Enter')
    
    async with testmu.step('PRIMARY: Add to Cart button for HTC Touch HD | HINTS: position=center-right; container=product purchase panel below the $146.00 price; click the light blue pill-shaped button to the right of the dark gray button because the dark gray control just added the item to product comparison, not cart', instruction_id='18a2f389-0112-4332-a1eb-399339450913'):
        coords = await testmu.get_vision_coordinates(page, 'PRIMARY: Add to Cart button for HTC Touch HD | HINTS: position=center-right; container=product purchase panel below the $146.00 price; click the light blue pill-shaped button to the right of the dark gray button because the dark gray control just added the item to product comparison, not cart', "click", 1422, 491)
        await page.mouse.click(coords['x'], coords['y'])
        


if __name__ == "__main__":
    testmu.run(test)

title: Cart dropdown shows item names and prices
source_description: User can open the cart dropdown and see all added items with their names and prices.
steps: Assert items listed with names and prices
kane_code:

    Mirrors Selenium's ranked-selector iteration: tries each locator in the
    order supplied and stops at the first match, preserving selector rank

        description=description)`` — a VisionLocator that triggers the heal
        cascade when its action method is awaited.
      - description omitted (V4 path): raises ``TimeoutError``.
    """

    raise TimeoutError("ranked locator resolution exhausted — no selector matched")


@testmu.test
async def test(page: Page):

title: Remove item recalculates cart total
source_description: User can remove an item from the cart and the cart total updates correctly.
kane_code:
import os
import testmu
from testmu import expect, var, set_var
from playwright.async_api import Page

testmu.configure(
    build="393ca4dd-7688-446c-a1af-369ab15ca199",
    name="Remove Item and Recalculate Cart Total",
    tc_id="TC-41444",
    network=os.getenv("NETWORK", "false").lower() == "true",
    variables={"__cp_final": "true"},
    default_action_timeout_ms=10000,
